---
title: "Research"
description: "Longer write-ups — maths, runnable code, and honest limitations."
listing:
  contents: "research/**/*.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [date, title, description, reading-time, categories]
  categories: true
  feed: true
toc: false
---

Worked pieces, roughly in the spirit of an open lab notebook. Each ships with the
code to reproduce it. Comments and corrections are welcome by
[email](mailto:davidolivermaguire@gmail.com).
